How to come to a consensus on what a definition is?

- a definition contains prior knowlage 

On our state of mind 30.04.2026
It is good to be in this state (lost and meaningless state of mind) because it is the only true state, other states of mind are an illusion!

Our state of mind was greatly influence and can be described in three points: 

1) Not being sure how to proceed to achieve our goal: getting a better and deeper understanding of the laser to have a numerical simulation
2) Our dive into this task lead us to see some of the complexity and some difficulties of this task: 
    - finding resources
    - how to be sure of having the same understanding of concepts
    - being sure of our next step; to come to an agreement about our next step
3) The limited time we found ourselves in, which the previous points are unclear and not agreed upon, exerts stress
